headline: Countdown to Darden Restaurants (DRI) Q4 Earnings: A Look at Estimates Beyond Revenue and EPS
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Darden Restaurants (DRI), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended May 2026.
